name: Lite 'n Easy Crustless Pumpkin Pie
recipeIngredient: Dark brown sugar (6 tbsp, packed) or low-cal sweetener equivalent
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, sprinkle gelatin over cold water to soften; set aside.
2. In a small saucepan, heat 1 cup of the evaporated milk to just boiling.
3. Slowly stir the hot milk into the gelatin; stir until the gelatin is dissolved.
4. Mix in the remaining evaporated milk, pumpkin, brown sugar, pumpkin pie spice, and vanilla; set aside.
5. Spray a 10-inch glass pie plate with non-stick vegetable coating.
6. Pour the mixture into the pie plate and chill until firm.
Calories: 97
Fat: 2 g
Sodium: 70 mg
Cholesterol: 4 mg
Source: No Guilt Desserts
